mapper.select: select * from ygt_member_share_invite where ygt_msi_share_code = #{shareCode} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into ygt_member_share_invite (ygt_msi_share_code, ygt_msi_source_type, ygt_msi_inviter_customer_user_id, ygt_msi_wecom_group_id, ygt_msi_campaign_id, ygt_msi_corp_id, ygt_msi_chat_id, ygt_msi_community_id, ygt_msi_status, ygt_msi_expire_time, ygt_msi_create_time, ygt_msi_update_time) values (#{ygtMsiShareCode}, #{ygtMsiSourceType}, #{ygtMsiInviterCustomerUserId}, #{ygtMsiWecomGroupId}, #{ygtMsiCampaignId}, #{ygtMsiCorpId}, #{ygtMsiChatId}, #{ygtMsiCommunityId}, #{ygtMsiStatus}, #{ygtMsiExpireTime}, #{ygtMsiCreateTime}, #{ygtMsiUpdateTime})
mapper.delete: delete from ygt_member_share_invite where ygt_member_share_invite_id in #{id}
